case_title: GARY J SIPOS VS. DAVID E BIDDLE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SIPOS, GARY J AS TO DEFENDANT BIDDLE, DAVID E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIPOS, GARY J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIDDLE, DAVID E $5,225.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,359.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL EXPENSES, 8 HOURS OF LOST WORK, AND PAIN AND SUFFERING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BIDDLE, DAVID E
COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SIPOS, GARY J
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2010 - JUDGMENT.
